headline: Molecular Biology: The Central Dogma
description: The Central Dogma describes the flow of genetic information from DNA to RNA to protein. CRISPR-Cas9 has revolutionized molecular biology by enabling precise genome editing in any organism.

citation.name: Molecular Biology of the Gene, 7th Edition
A Programmable Dual-RNA-Guided DNA Endonuclease in Adaptive Bacterial Immunity
